translations.en: The bellhop is bringing our suitcases.
translations.it: Il facchino porta le nostre valigie.
translations.zh-Hans: 行李员把我们的行李箱拿过来。
translations.yue: 行李員幫我哋拎行李箱。
translations.vi: Nhân viên hành lý đang mang vali của chúng tôi.
translations.hi: बेलबॉय हमारे सूटकेस ला रहा है।
translations.el: Το γκρουμ φέρνει τις βαλίτσες μας.
translations.ja: ベルボーイが私たちのスーツケースを運んでいます。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, masculine singular, introducing the subject noun.
Masculine common noun functioning as the subject.
Main lexical verb, present indicative 3rd person singular.
Possessive determiner, plural, agreeing with 'valises'.
Plural common noun serving as the direct object of 'apporte'.

sentences.target: Mon oncle est chasseur le dimanche.

translations.fr: Mon oncle est chasseur le dimanche.
translations.en: My uncle is a hunter on Sundays.
translations.es: Mi tío es cazador los domingos.
translations.it: Mio zio è cacciatore la domenica.
translations.zh-Hans: 我叔叔每个星期天去打猎。
translations.yue: 我叔叔逢星期日會去打獵。
translations.pt: Meu tio é caçador aos domingos.
translations.he: הדוד שלי הוא צייד בימי ראשון.
translations.vi: Chú tôi đi săn vào các ngày Chủ nhật.
translations.nl: Mijn oom is op zondag jager.
translations.hi: मेरे चाचा रविवार को शिकार करते हैं।
translations.el: Ο θείος μου είναι κυνηγός τις Κυριακές.
translations.nb: Onkelen min er jeger på søndager.
translations.id: Paman saya berburu pada hari Minggu.
translations.sv: Min farbror är jägare på söndagar.
translations.da: Min onkel er jæger om søndagen.
translations.ja: 日曜はおじが猟師です。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner, masculine singular, modifying 'oncle'.
Common noun functioning as the subject.
Copular auxiliary linking the subject to a predicate nominal.
Predicate nominal indicating a profession.
Definite article used with a day of the week.
Common noun naming the day; temporal complement.

sentences.target: Tu peux appeler le chasseur pour un taxi.
sentences.reading: /ty pø apəle lə ʃasœʁ puʁ œ̃ taksi/

translations.fr: Tu peux appeler le chasseur pour un taxi.
translations.ipa: /ty pø apəle lə ʃasœʁ puʁ œ̃ taksi/
translations.en: You can call the bellhop for a taxi.
translations.es: Puedes llamar al botones para un taxi.
translations.de: Du kannst den Pagen um ein Taxi bitten.
translations.it: Puoi chiamare il facchino per un taxi.
translations.zh-Hans: 你可以找行李员叫一辆出租车。
translations.yue: 你可以搵行李員幫手叫的士。
translations.ru: Ты можешь попросить коридорного вызвать такси.
translations.pt: Você pode pedir ao mensageiro um táxi.
translations.he: אפשר לקרוא לסבל כדי להזמין מונית.
translations.vi: Bạn có thể nhờ nhân viên hành lý gọi taxi.
translations.ar: يمكنك طلب سيارة أجرة من حامل الحقائب.
translations.nl: Je kunt de piccolo bellen voor een taxi.
translations.uk: Ти можеш попросити коридорного викликати таксі.
translations.hi: तुम टैक्सी के लिए बेलबॉय को बुला सकते हो।
translations.pl: Możesz poprosić boya hotelowego o taksówkę.
translations.el: Μπορείς να καλέσεις το γκρουμ για ένα ταξί.
translations.nb: Du kan be piccoloen om en taxi.
translations.id: Kamu bisa memanggil bellboy untuk memesan taksi.
translations.sv: Du kan be piccolon ordna en taxi.
translations.ro: Poți chema hamalul pentru un taxi.
translations.da: Du kan ringe til piccoloen efter en taxa.
translations.ja: ベルボーイにタクシーを呼んでもらえます。

tokens.explanation: 2nd-person singular subject pronoun.
Modal auxiliary, present indicative 2nd person singular.
Infinitive verb serving as the complement of the modal 'peux'.
Definite article introducing the direct object noun.
Common noun serving as the direct object of 'appeler'.
Preposition introducing a purpose phrase.
Indefinite article introducing 'taxi'.
Common noun; object of the preposition 'pour'.

sentences.target: On croise un chasseur près des champs.
sentences.reading: /ɔ̃ kʁwaz œ̃ ʃasœʁ pʁɛ de ʃɑ̃/

translations.fr: On croise un chasseur près des champs.
translations.ipa: /ɔ̃ kʁwaz œ̃ ʃasœʁ pʁɛ de ʃɑ̃/
translations.en: We run into a hunter near the fields.
translations.es: Nos cruzamos con un cazador cerca de los campos.
translations.de: Wir treffen einen Jäger in der Nähe der Felder.
translations.it: Incontriamo un cacciatore vicino ai campi.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们在田野附近遇到了一位猎人。
translations.yue: 我哋喺田野附近遇到一個獵人。
translations.pt: Encontramos um caçador perto dos campos.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi gặp một thợ săn gần cánh đồng.
translations.nl: We komen een jager tegen bij de velden.
translations.hu: A mezők mellett összefutunk egy vadásszal.
translations.hi: हम खेतों के पास एक शिकारी से मिलते हैं।
translations.el: Συναντάμε έναν κυνηγό κοντά στα χωράφια.
translations.nb: Vi møter en jeger nær jordene.
translations.id: Kami bertemu seorang pemburu di dekat ladang.
translations.sv: Vi stöter på en jägare nära fälten.
translations.da: Vi møder en jæger nær markerne.
translations.ja: 私たちは畑の近くで猟師に出会います。

tokens.explanation: Impersonal/collective subject pronoun.
Main lexical verb, present indicative 3rd person singular (agrees with 'On').
Indefinite article introducing the object noun.
Singular common noun serving as direct object.
Adverb used in the fixed locution 'près de' to express proximity.
Contraction of preposition 'de' + definite article 'les', introducing the noun phrase.
Plural common noun; object of the preposition.
